text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Teio, Teio! You know what day it is today?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What about today? You mean the carrot bread
sale?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Wrooong! That wasn't even close! Here's a
hint—Turbo!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! You're treating me to carrot bread today!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Wrong again! Why the heck would I treat you?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
If it's not that, then I bet you're giving me a
shoulder massage today!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
In your dreams! Those are just things you want me
to do!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe, just kidding. Happy birthday, Turbo.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: ...Ah?! No, you were right! You finally got it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Why'd you get mad at me for getting it right...
